infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Forge reads your Apple Health activity to automatically complete your habits like steps, sleep, water, and workouts.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Forge updates your habit progress in Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Forge Habits creates calendar entries for your habits so you can see them in Apple Calendar alongside your other events.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Forge Habits creates and manages calendar entries for your habits so you can see them in Apple Calendar alongside your other events.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Forge Habits creates reminders for your habits so they appear in the Apple Reminders app.
